name: Arancini- Sicilian Rice Balls

ingredients.item: 1/2 inch cubed mozzarella for inserting inside

method: In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil, raw rice, and saute for a minute. Add garlic, salt, pepper, parsley, beef stock, tomato paste, and butter. Cook for 20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed and rice is cooked al dente. Add parmesan and mix well. Spread hot rice on a parchment-lined baking sheet to cool. While the rice is cooling, set up three bowls. In one put flour, salt, and pepper. Whisk eggs in the second bowl and add breadcrumbs to the third bowl. Cube mozzarella into about 18, ½ inch pieces. When the rice is cool enough to handle form approximately 18, 1-inch balls. Insert a cube of cheese in the center. Repeat on all the rice balls. Dredge each ball, first in flour, then egg, and then breadcrumbs and fry until golden brown. Makes about 18 rice balls. Serve as an appetizer! Olé
